---
title: "The Wars of Wapsburgh. By the author of  “The Heir of Redclyffe.”"
---

## The Wars of Wapsburgh. By the author of  “The Heir of Redclyffe.”

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1864
**Genre:** Fiction (fantasy)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** Groombridge and Sons, 5, Paternoster Row, London.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
